entitySuffixRule: Must contain "limited liability company" or the abbreviation "L.L.C." or "LLC".
distinguishabilityNote: Must be distinguishable in the records of the Florida Department of State from the names of all other registered entities; differences limited to suffixes, articles, punctuation, word-form variations, or the symbol "&" do not make a name distinguishable.
nameReservationCostBasis: The $25 fee is the whole cost. Florida has no online reservation, so there is no online service charge to add.
notes: Florida lists no specific restricted words for LLCs, but the name may not imply a purpose other than one authorized by Chapter 605 or suggest a connection with a state or federal government agency (§ 605.0112(1)). Name reservation (§ 605.01125, $25 per the Division of Corporations fee schedule) is made by a signed letter to the Department of State. There is no online reservation, and the reservation is non-renewable. A name is only finally approved when the articles of organization are filed.
